product.name: ArFlexMembrane
product.titleDescriptor: Tension Fabric Without PVC for Architectural Usage
product.specLine: 900 g/m², 28% Polyester 2% Elastane 70% Polyurethane, Flexible Outdoor Membrane
descriptions: It's used for lightweight outdoor roof systems.
The base material is polyester and elastane mixture knit fabric which is coated by polyurethane layer.
It's three time more flexible than other tarpaulins and do not contain any pvc.
Tension Fabric Without PVC for Architectural Usage
900 g/m², 28% Polyester 2% Elastane 70% Polyurethane, Flexible Outdoor Membrane
technicalParameters: Fiber | 28% Polyester (PES) 2% Elastane (EL) %70 Polyurethane (PU) | EN ISO 2076
Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: titleDescriptor: 'Tension Fabric Without PVC for Architectural Usage'
descriptions: 'It's used for lightweight outdoor roof systems.'
